publishedAbstract: There is a known issue in VMWare/vSphere that fails to mark the devices/disks as flash. In ODF, only flash/non-rotational devices are supported, and in ODF v4.18+ the installs are now blocked unless the devices present themselves as flash.
publishedTitle: VMWare/vSphere New Install of OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) is Failing on ODF v4.18+
